# Copilot Instructions

- This repo is a lightweight React and Vite demo for teaching GitHub Copilot to beginners.
- Keep the app focused on JavaScript, React, HTML, and CSS. Avoid adding heavy frameworks or game engines.
- Preserve the `Demo TODO` comments in `src/App.jsx`; they are intentional teaching prompts for the live class.
- Prefer readable beginner-friendly code over clever abstractions.
- Keep UI changes accessible, responsive, and easy to explain during a workshop.
- For future agent-mode changes, keep the game playable while adding visual polish such as a Copilot-themed ball or arcade-style animations.
- Update `README.md` or `docs/instructor-guide.md` when changing the teaching flow.
